business_description.nature_of_business: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors, headquartered in Columbus, Ohio.

coverages_discussed.notes: Workers' Compensation coverage is provided through Ohio Bureau of Workers' Compensation per state statute.
coverages_discussed.requested_limit: Statutory basis with employers' liability of $1,000,000/$1,000,000/$1,000,000

coverages_discussed.notes: Occurrence form, including standard premises/operations and products/completed operations.
Business Auto covering all owned, hired, and non-owned vehicles.
Coverage for all scheduled locations on a special form with replacement cost valuation.
Following form over primary General Liability, Auto, and Employers Liability.
Motor Truck Cargo coverage as per expiring program.

document_info.prepared_by: David Reinhardt, Vice President, Transportation Insurance Specialists

extracted_text_sections.claims_narrative: The loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period. Over the review period, the insured has incurred 48 total claims with $1,378,733.13 in total paid losses and $1,503,069.19 total incurred. Currently, 10 claims remain open and 38 have been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 12.9% (avg annual incurred $300,613.84 against current annual premium $2,330,887.36 over 5-year period). Breakdown by coverage line: Workers' Compensation: 24 claims, $826,622.56 paid, $888,785.06 incurred; General Liability: 5 claims, $54,126.51 paid, $54,126.51 incurred; Commercial Auto: 16 claims, $387,376.46 paid, $449,550.02 incurred; Commercial Property: 2 claims, $106,691.36 paid, $106,691.36 incurred; Umbrella / Excess: 0 claims, $0.00 paid, $0.00 incurred; Motor Truck Cargo: 1 claim, $3,916.24 paid, $3,916.24 incurred.
extracted_text_sections.executive_summary: We are pleased to submit Great Lakes Freight Systems, Inc. for your review and consideration. The insured is a regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors, headquartered in Columbus, with approximately 38 years of operating history. Coverage is requested for Workers' Compensation, General Liability, Commercial Auto, Commercial Property, Umbrella / Excess, Motor Truck Cargo.
extracted_text_sections.operations_description: Regional trucking and freight logistics — LTL and FTL general freight, warehousing and distribution services across the Midwest and Mid-Atlantic corridors, headquartered in Columbus, Ohio.
extracted_text_sections.safety_programs: The insured maintains a formal business continuity and disaster recovery plan tested annually. The insured maintains a dedicated safety committee that meets monthly and conducts quarterly site audits. An employee assistance program and workplace wellness initiative have been in place for over five years. The insured carries contractual risk transfer provisions in all subcontractor and vendor agreements. A third-party risk control survey was completed within the past 12 months with favorable results. The insured has implemented a formal return-to-work program that has reduced lost-time claims by over 30%. All locations are equipped with security camera systems and 24/7 monitored alarms. With 485 employees and structured HR practices, the insured manages low turnover and consistent safety training. The insured's fleet of 37 vehicles is maintained under a documented preventive maintenance schedule.

concerns: Loss experience reflects a mixed trend with some large individual claims in the review period.
risk_highlights.loss_history_summary: Over the review period, the insured incurred 48 total claims with $1,378,733.13 in total paid losses and $1,503,069.19 total incurred. Currently, 10 claims remain open and 38 have been closed. Annualized loss ratio is 12.9%.
